description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 4 hrs 16 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 1 hr 2 mins. His tracked work was mostly in Java, with additional time in Markdown and other languages. The data shows activity across 3 projects, but does not list any public repository names or GitHub commits.
